candidates.title: Post-Release CI Run-ID Recorder
candidates.description: Adds scripts/update_release_assurance_ci.py, a deterministic helper that queries GitHub Actions for core workflow runs associated with a release tag and injects run IDs and URLs into the post-release assurance dossier (docs/releases/v0.6.X-post-release-assurance.md) and its optional JSON mirror. Dry-run by default; requires --write to mutate files. Uses the authenticated gh CLI and Python standard library only. Includes tests with mocked gh output. Does not enable live trading, live submit, broker/provider execution, credential loading, network access, order placement, pending-order creation, or approval queue mutation.
notes: Accepted into the v0.6.23 candidate chain on 2026-07-13 with acceptance verdict PASS.
Released as part of v0.6.23 on 2026-07-13. GitHub-only release; no PyPI publication.
The script and tests have landed on main as unreleased supporting work and are now released in v0.6.23.
Core workflows filtered: CI, Release Gate, Atlas Agent Paper Routines. Most recent run per workflow is retained.
Markdown and JSON updates are bounded to the GitHub Actions / CI Status section and the ci_status object, respectively.
Does not enable live trading, live submit, order placement, broker/provider execution, credential loading, network access, or approval queue mutation.
Does not change RiskManager, kill-switch, deadman, heartbeat, or audit hash-chain behavior, and does not broaden the CAND-014 extraction boundary.
